item.title: UPDATE: Hintermann Series H3 Total Ankle Replacement Has a Higher-Than-Expected Risk of Device Failure: FDA Safety Communication
item.description: Learn more about recommendations for patients who are considering a Hintermann Series H3 TAR system or who have one; recommendations for health care providers.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Anesthesia Kit Correction: Becton Dickinson Issues Correction for BD Spinal Trays Containing Bupivacaine Ampules
item.description: BD is correcting affected Spinal Trays by removing Bupivacaine ampule components
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: 2024 Safety Communications
item.description: Listing of Medical Device 2024 Safety Communications
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Early Alert: Catheter Introducer Kit Issue from Abiomed
item.description: Prolonged use of the Abiomed 14Fr Low Profile Introducer may lead to thrombus formation
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Pediatric Care Bed Correction: KayserBetten Issues Correction for KayserBett IDA Beds
item.description: If the hand controls to adjust the bed are not locked, children could adjust the bed and become entrapped.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Dexcom Uncovers Theft of Scrapped Product, Notifies Potentially Impacted Users
item.description: SAN DIEGO – MAY 26, 2026 – DexCom, Inc. (Nasdaq: DXCM), the global leader in glucose biosensing, announced today through ongoing quality and accounting reviews it recently identified certain lots of Dexcom G7 sensors originally designated as scrap and intended for destruction were stolen during the
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Cryoprobe Recall: Erbe USA Removes Flexible Cryoprobes
item.description: Erbe Cryoprobes may rupture during activation, leading to potential hearing loss, tinnitus, injury, or burns.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Ventilator Correction: Philips Issues Correction for Trilogy Evo Platform Ventilators
item.description: Philips Trilogy Evo Ventilators may not function as intended if used with certain nebulizers.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Early Alert: Heart Pump Issue from Abiomed
item.description: Specific Impella CP Sets are out of specification; use may result in low purge pressure events from the onset of the case
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Early Alert: IV Tubing Set Issue from ICU Medical
item.description: Black specks and particulate matter have been reported in the drip chamber of certain ICU Medical IV tubing sets
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Insulet Initiates Voluntary Medical Device Correction for Certain Omnipod® Pods in the U.S. and Affected International Markets
item.description: ACTON, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Insulet Corporation, Inc. (NASDAQ: PODD) (“Insulet” or the “Company”) today announced a voluntary Medical Device Correction for specific lots of Omnipod® 5, Omnipod DASH®, and Omnipod® Insulin Management System (Omnipod Eros) Pods due to a manufacturing issue, identif
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Manifold Recall: Medline Removes Namic Star Off Handle Manifolds
item.description: Particulates have the potential to be introduced into blood circulation and become lodged within blood vessels.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Dialysis Catheter Kit Recall: Arrow International Removes Dialysis Catheter Kits Containing Merit Medical Splittable Sheath Introducers
item.description: Arrow International is removing dialysis catheter kits containing recalled Merit Medical Splittable Sheath Introducers
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Early Alert: Heart Pump Controller Issue from Abiomed
item.description: A software error may cause the Automated Impella Controller to restart when used in conjunction with left ventricular Impella devices.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Ventilator Recall: React Health Removes VOCSN V+Pro Ventilators
item.description: React Health is removing affected devices due to a manufacturing process deviation that may result in an undetected oxygen leak condition.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Automated Compounding System Recall: Omnicell Removes Syringe Labels Used with the i.v.STATION Automated Compounding System
item.description: Certain labels used with i.v.STATION automated compounding systems may not be detected, leading to mislabeled sterile filled syringes.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Thoracic Stent Graft Recall: Bolton Medical Removes Relay Pro System
item.description: Affected grafts may not unclasp from the delivery system. This may require conversion to open surgical repair and can result in patient death.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Risks of Using TRUE METRIX Blood Glucose Monitoring Systems by Trividia Health: FDA Safety Communication
item.description: FDA alerts of risks with use TRUE METRIX Blood Glucose Monitoring Systems by Trividia Health.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Blood Glucose Monitor Recall: Trividia Health Issues Correction for TRUE METRIX Blood Glucose Monitoring Systems
item.description: Trividia recommends that device users who receive an E-5 error code and are experiencing symptoms of high glucose should seek medical care immediately.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Early Alert: Anesthesia Machine Issue from Draeger, Inc.
item.description: Draeger is correcting additional anesthesia workstations due to a manufacturing error that may cause the ventilator to fail before or during use.
item.dc:creator: FDA
